kept.text:
Good mythical ROBO morning ! 

We have just closed on day 10 of ROBO being born and things look absolutely beautiful. 

For the last 10 days supply has simply rotated from non believers to true believers who see a vision. The slow cooks always have the greatest rewards because you have delusional people buying up supply who have unheard of ceilings they want to reach! ROBO has crab walked sideways for just around 10days creating higher lows on the chart but in those 10 days creating an actual organic cult that’s coming together all and contributing in any way possible they can. 

You have people making cinematic masterpieces. Videos that are genuinely some of the highest production rot you can cook up. Than you have people making pure degenerate loop rot with robo. Content that genuinely has potential to go dumb viral. Some people hand making crazy art pieces on top of all that! You have multiple different TikTok accounts over 5 so far posting Robo just for fun, no one is asking anything from the community people just believe and want to genuinely help which is legendary! 

This Minecraft video posted by @1aboc on his timeline that went giga viral is also such a prime example of the potential Robo has 

https://t.co/SvrX6d31OI

The TikTok itself is a perfect example of the potential this character has. The account I have created has only been live for 24 hours and in that 24 hours we have already generated 150 followers on the page and 2 videos with 10k views each. Actually crazy, and those are purely all normies just loving Robo for who Robo is and appreciating the content behind it. 

10 days of just pure accumulation and only building a stronger core community. 

These are the charts and the vibes everyone is so horny for all the time but always terrified to actually commit and bid them because they are so used to something quick. This is the coin that will melt faces and everyone will simply say how did I miss that I’ve seeen it everywhere. It’ll happen not if but when. 

Do not be robo lined 

EC1TMMg4shn1XrYNy5Y5a98LT6kjNcFtgnav11jSpump

シニアスタッフで働きながらAIを猛勉強中。
実績なし・借金ありの社会人。
AI自動化で月5万円安定を目指してます。
n8n / GAS / ClaudeCodeの進捗と失敗を毎日発信。
筋トレとピストバイクとスニーカーが好きです。 中古の自転車パーツやスニーカーを安く購入して、手入れしながら使うことを楽しんでいます👟🚲 ゲームや筋トレなどゆるく楽しむ雑多な内容のポスト、そんな感じの看護師やってます。

kept.text:
フォロワー1万人でもリーチ率は平均3〜5%。つまり届いてるのは300〜500人。

差を作るのは"保存される投稿"の本数。保存率が高い投稿はアルゴリズムが48時間後にもう一度拡散してくれる。

自分の場合、図解入りの保存率はテキストのみの約3倍だった。

みなさんは保存率、意識して運用してますか？
